headline: Lululemon appointed former Levi Strauss CEO Chip Bergh to its Board of Directors, while current lead director David Mussafer announced his upcoming retirement.
investor_impact: The addition of veteran retail executive Chip Bergh brings valuable global apparel and brand-building expertise to the board, which should support Lululemon's international expansion. While the retirement of lead director David Mussafer marks a notable governance transition, the succession appears orderly and should not disrupt strategic execution.
key_figures: Board size temporarily increased from 9 to 10 members
Board size to reduce from 10 to 9 members following the 2026 Annual Meeting
